hero.headline: Smarter community management. Better resident experience.
hero.subheadline: JAR connects developers, residents, and service providers in one unified platform.

about.title: A Saudi platform connecting every stakeholder in residential communities
about.body: JAR brings developers, residents, and service providers together in one digital system — for smarter management and a better experience for everyone.
about.point3: Live reports and data at your fingertips

solutions.title: What Does JAR Offer?
solutions.subtitle: Six integrated solutions covering every aspect of residential community management
solutions.card1_desc: All unit and resident details in one place — organized and easy
solutions.card2_desc: Receive maintenance requests and assign them to providers instantly
solutions.card3_desc: An app connecting residents to all their needs from the comfort of home
solutions.card4_desc: Manage fees and payments with full transparency and real-time reports
solutions.card5_desc: Real data to help you make better decisions for your community
solutions.card6_desc: All stakeholders in one system — no chaos, no fragmentation

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here to help. Fill in the form and we'll get back to you as soon as possible
contact.name: Full Name
contact.success_message: Thank you for reaching out. We'll reply within 24 hours.

problem.tagline: Managing residential communities today is fragmented and unnecessarily complex
problem.card1_desc: Every party uses a different tool — no single system brings everyone together
problem.card2_desc: Requests get lost, responses are delayed, residents are left waiting with no updates
problem.card3_desc: Paper, spreadsheets, phone calls — all sources of errors and wasted time
problem.card4_desc: No real reports, no clear numbers — decisions are made on gut feel, not data

demo.title: See JAR in Action
demo.subtitle: A real experience for every stakeholder in the ecosystem
demo.svc_subtitle: Choose service type and preferred time

marketing.quote1: We believe every resident deserves a professionally managed community, and every manager deserves tools that make their work easier.
